text: Premise: A child is playing soccer. Hypothesis: A kid is playing a sport.
label: entailment

text: Premise: A chef is cooking dinner. Hypothesis: Nobody is in the kitchen.
label: contradiction

text: Premise: People are walking through a city square. Hypothesis: It is a busy afternoon downtown.
label: neutral

text: Premise: A woman is reading on a train. Hypothesis: She is holding a book.
label: entailment

text: Premise: Two dogs are sleeping by the door. Hypothesis: The animals are running outside.
label: contradiction

text: Premise: Students are entering a lecture hall. Hypothesis: A class may be about to start.
label: neutral

text: Premise: A man is fixing a bicycle. Hypothesis: He is repairing a bike.
label: entailment

text: Premise: A family is eating at a restaurant. Hypothesis: They are alone at home.
label: contradiction

text: Premise: Workers are meeting in an office. Hypothesis: They might be planning a project.
label: neutral
